creator: Aisha Malik
title: (No AI) Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
dc:creator: Aisha Malik
content: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.
contentSnippet: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

title: (No AI) Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
content: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

title: (No AI) The $27 million Al proxy war over Alex Bores ends in a draw
author: Tina Nguyen
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/gettyimages-2282522212.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Alex Bores (D-NY) enters his watch party at The Freehand Hotel after conceding the congressional race to Micah Lasher who will replace Rep Jerry Nadler (D-NY) in NY's 12th Congressional District on June 23, 2026 in New York City. | Photo by Laura Brett/Getty Images.

The expensive, [$27 million political proxy war between Anthropic and OpenAI](https://www.theverge.com/policy/954970/ai-super-pacs-alex-bores-new-york-12th-district) came to a draw last night when Alex Bores, a New York state Assemblyman whose popularity surged after being targeted by a pro-AI super PAC, [narrowly lost the Democratic primary](https://www.washingtonpost.com/elections/2026/06/23/new-york-house-ny-12-primary-election-live-results-lasher-bores-lead/) to represent New York's 12th Congressional district.

Prior to the race, Bores, a former tech industry employee, had coauthored and successfully passed the high-profile RAISE Act, which had implemented [guardrails and safety requirements on frontier AI companies](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/844062/parents-call-for-new-york-governor-to-sign-landmark-ai-safety-bill); a version of his bill was [signed into state law last year](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/849293/ai-alliance-universities-colleges-funding-ad-campaign-against-raise-act). But the legislation drew the ire of Leading the Future, a $100 million su …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/956263/alex-bores-new-york-12th-district-congressional-primary-results)
contentSnippet:
Alex Bores (D-NY) enters his watch party at The Freehand Hotel after conceding the congressional race to Micah Lasher who will replace Rep Jerry Nadler (D-NY) in NY's 12th Congressional District on June 23, 2026 in New York City. | Photo by Laura Brett/Getty Images.	

The expensive, $27 million political proxy war between Anthropic and OpenAI came to a draw last night when Alex Bores, a New York state Assemblyman whose popularity surged after being targeted by a pro-AI super PAC, narrowly lost the Democratic primary to represent New York's 12th Congressional district. 
Prior to the race, Bores, a former tech industry employee, had coauthored and successfully passed the high-profile RAISE Act, which had implemented guardrails and safety requirements on frontier AI companies; a version of his bill was signed into state law last year. But the legislation drew the ire of Leading the Future, a $100 million su …

title: (No AI) Figma now has AI motion graphics and shader tools
author: Jess Weatherbed
content:
![A collection of images showing the product updates announced at Config 2026.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/Figma-config-2026.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Figma has [revealed some new design and coding product updates](https://www.figma.com/blog/config-2026-recap/) at its [annual Config conference](https://config.figma.com/) that aim to help creatives "push their ideas further" and automate tedious tasks with AI. Part of this is a reimagined canvas that's now optimized for full-stack development, according to Figma, bringing teams, [AI agents](https://www.theverge.com/news/783828/figma-make-ai-app-coding-mcp-server-update), tools, and materials "together in one place."

Notable callouts include coding layers that let you tweak the code of your projects without leaving the Figma Design canvas, and [AI-generated motion graphics effects](https://www.figma.com/blog/introducing-figma-motion/), which allow you to make animations and transition effects by simply describing them to Figma's chatbot interface. You c …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/955831/figma-code-design-tools-config-2026-announcements)

title: (No AI) OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip

contentSnippet: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

creator: Hugo Lowell
title: (No AI) The Trump White House Is Over Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei

content: At high-stakes meetings with the White House, Anthropic's cofounder—a "weirdo," per one official—has been replaced by cofounder Tom Brown.
